expected.answer: Movate is an AI-first technology services company that helps enterprises build, deploy, and operate AI agents on the mdk platform.

input.question: How can I reach your sales team?

expected.answer: Sure! You can reach our sales team at sales@movate.com.

input.question: Where do I go for support?

expected.answer: For support, you can visit support.movate.com.

input.question: What can the mdk platform do?

expected.answer: The mdk platform supports voice agents, knowledge graphs, workflows, and enterprise connectors.
